purpose: Initializes the program by accepting current date values and opening output files, checking for open errors.
Reads the next authorization summary segment from IMS, updates counters, writes to output file, and triggers detail processing if applicable.
Closes the output files and displays error messages if the close operation fails.
Abnormally terminates the program with return code 16 when an error occurs during file opening.
Abnormally terminates the program with return code 16 when an error occurs during the opening of the second output file.
Processes all detail segments for the current summary segment by reading and writing child segments until no more are found.
Terminates the program with a return code of 16 when an unexpected IMS status code is encountered during summary segment retrieval.
Terminates the program with a return code of 16 when an unexpected IMS status code is encountered during detail segment retrieval.
